title: stelis samson
intro: Stelis samson, also known as the samson orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Stelis samson include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a paste or salve to aid in skin care and wound healing.
